code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const QualityGateBadge=_ref=>{let{status,size='md'}=_ref;const passed=status==='PASSED';const unknown=status==='UNKNOWN';const sizeClasses={sm:'px-2 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold rounded',md:'px-3 py-1 text-sm font-semibold rounded',lg:'px-6 py-2 text-base font-semibold rounded-md shadow-sm'};if(unknown){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`inline-block ${sizeClasses[size]} bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 border border-slate-200`,children:"NOT COMPUTED"});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:`inline-block text-white ${sizeClasses[size]} ${passed?'bg-sonar-green':'bg-sonar-red'}`,children:passed?'PASSED':'FAILED'});};
